class.name: ResonanceAudioEffect
class.brief_description: Audio bus effect for reverb output. Auto-configured by ResonanceRuntime.
class.description: ResonanceAudioEffect is an [AudioEffect] that processes the reverb bus. It is added automatically to the "ResonanceReverb" bus when [ResonanceRuntime] initializes. For Convolution reflection type, it reads from the Steam Audio reflection mixer. For Parametric/Hybrid, reverb is applied per-source in [ResonancePlayer]; no mixer output. Adjust [member gain_db] for reverb bus volume. Typically no manual configuration needed.

members.member: Volume correction in dB for the reverb bus. 0 = unity.
